productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Puntero VII Trx HG White Sports Shoes
description: Designed for lightweight support, control and durability, these adidas Puntero 6 TRX FG soccer cleats feature a synthetic leather upper, a clean strike zone, EVA cushioning and the TRAXION FG outsole for grip.UpperSynthetic leather upper for light weight and durabilityAsymmetrical lacing for better ball contactComfortable textile liningPatented adidas three stripes on the sides for styleBrand name appliqued on the tongueMidsoleDie-cut EVA insole for comfortOutsoleTRAXION FG outsole for grip and comfort on firm natural surfacesshoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
